command_language_success: ✅ Language has been changed to English.
command_play_description: Play a song from YouTube, Spotify, or SoundCloud.
command_stop_description: Stops the music and clears the queue.
command_report_description: Report a problem to the bot developers.
command_setup_report_description: Set up a problem reporting panel with a button (Admin only).
command_help_description: Displays the bot's features and commands.
command_lyrics_description: Show lyrics for the current song or a search query.
msg_error_voice_required: ❌ You must be in a voice channel to use this command.
msg_error_same_voice_required: ❌ You must be in the same voice channel as the bot.
msg_stopped: 🛑 Stopped playing and cleared the queue.
msg_lyrics_not_found: ❌ No lyrics found for this song.
msg_lyrics_no_service: ❌ Lyrics service is not configured (missing Genius token).
msg_no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to use this control.
emb_np_footer: 🎛️ Controls: server admins, DJ role, or the person who queued the song
modal_report_placeholder: Explain the problem you have encountered in detail...
msg_report_success: ✅ Your report has been successfully submitted.
emb_setup_report_desc: Click the button below to report a problem to the bot developers.
msg_error_command: ❌ An error occurred while executing this command.
msg_queue_full: ❌ The queue is full! Maximum {max_size} songs allowed.
help_desc: **Discord's most advanced music bot!** You can use the following commands and features.
help_cmd_desc:
**/play <song/url>** - Play music (YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud)
**/nowplaying** - Information about the current song
**/help** - Display this help menu
**/lyrics [query]** - Show lyrics for a song
help_btn_desc:
⏸️/▶️ **Pause/Resume** - Pause or resume the music
⏭️ **Skip** - Skip to the next song
⏹️ **Stop** - Stop the music completely
📋 **Queue** - Display the playback queue
🔀 **Shuffle** - Shuffle the queue
🔊 **Volume** - Adjust the volume
🎛️ **Filter** - Apply audio filters (Bassboost, Nightcore...)
help_plat_desc:
🔴 **YouTube** - Video/music links and search
🟢 **Spotify** - Song/playlist/album links
🟠 **SoundCloud** - Music links and search
🔗 **Direct Link** - MP3, WAV, OGG files
help_feat_desc:
🔐 **Permission System** - Only authorized users and the music starter can control
🆔 **Security** - Unique ID per session, old buttons don't work
📱 **Dynamic Interface** - Buttons update according to status
🧹 **Auto Cleanup** - Unnecessary messages deleted
⚡ **Fast Response** - Instant embed updates
🔄 **Auto Leave** - Automatically leaves 5 minutes after music ends
help_start_desc:
1️⃣ Join a voice channel
2️⃣ Use the `/play <song name>` command
3️⃣ Control the music with the buttons!

💡 **Tip:** Share a Spotify playlist link, all songs will be added automatically!
help_footer: Music Bot • High quality music experience • {date}
